name: Risk Register Builder
description: Turn unstructured project notes, workshop output, or meeting minutes into a formal risk register with likelihood, impact, risk score, mitigation strategy, and owner — ready for steering committee reporting.
author: accilium

variables.name: PROJECT_NOTES
variables.description: Raw input: meeting notes, workshop cards, emails, or a brain dump of concerns.
variables.example: Vendor contract not signed yet; key architect leaving in Sept; data quality in legacy system unclear...

variables.name: PROJECT_CONTEXT
variables.description: One or two sentences on the project so risks can be assessed in context.
variables.example: ERP migration for a 2,000-employee utility, go-live January, fixed regulatory deadline

variables.name: RISK_APPETITE
variables.description: Optional guidance on what the organization considers acceptable.
variables.example: Regulatory deadline is immovable; budget has 10% contingency; reputational risk highly sensitive

example_input: PROJECT_NOTES: vendor contract unsigned, architect leaving; PROJECT_CONTEXT: ERP migration, fixed go-live; RISK_APPETITE: deadline immovable
